overview:
IOUserNetworkPacket  getVlanTag Instance MethodgetVlanTagDriverKit 24.0+bool getVlanTag(uint16_t * vlanTag) const; Parameters vlanTagPointer to return vlanTag from the packet.

True if the tag is present, false otherwise.

Get the Vlan Tag from the packet, where the driver has enabled the kFeatureHardwareVlan capability, for the case that feature is not enabled, this method will return false.

# getVlanTag | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ NetworkingDriverKit ](/documentation/networkingdriverkit)

- [ IOUserNetworkPacket ](/documentation/networkingdriverkit/iousernetworkpacket)

- [ getVlanTag ](/documentation/NetworkingDriverKit/IOUserNetworkPacket/getVlanTag)

-  getVlanTag 

Instance Method# getVlanTag

DriverKit 24.0+

```
bool getVlanTag(uint16_t * vlanTag) const;
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/NetworkingDriverKit/IOUserNetworkPacket/getVlanTag#parameters)

`vlanTag`Pointer to return vlanTag from the packet.

## [Return Value](/documentation/NetworkingDriverKit/IOUserNetworkPacket/getVlanTag#return-value)

True if the tag is present, false otherwise.

## [Discussion](/documentation/NetworkingDriverKit/IOUserNetworkPacket/getVlanTag#discussion)

Get the Vlan Tag from the packet, where the driver has enabled the kFeatureHardwareVlan capability, for the case that feature is not enabled, this method will return false.
